headline: Stryker showcases continued innovation across orthopaedics at AAOS 2026 Annual Meeting
summary: Stryker (NYSE: SYK), a global leader in medical technologies, showcases its commitment to innovation across orthopaedic specialties with the introduction of the newest additions to the Triathlon® Total Knee System, the expanded Mako SmartRobotics™ portfolio and continued evolution of the power tool portfolio at the American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons' (AAOS) 2026 Annual Meeting in New Orleans.
